issues.title: Maintainer-filed enhancement to add scroll wheel event support to GTK3 and GTK4 SKDrawingArea views, normalizing values to the v120 standard (120 = one discrete notch), as part of the cross-platform v120 normalization effort (#3533).
issues.issueTitle: Add wheel support to GTK3/GTK4 views with v120 normalization

issues.title: Enhancement request to add scroll wheel and full touch/input event infrastructure to WPF (SKElement, SKGLElement) and Windows Forms (SKControl, SKGLControl) views, which currently only handle PaintSurface with no input event support.
issues.issueTitle: Add wheel support to WPF and Windows Forms views with v120 normalization

issues.title: Maintainer-filed enhancement to add scroll wheel support to SkiaSharp's Tizen MAUI views by handling WheelEvent in the Tizen SKTouchHandler with v120 normalization (120 units = one discrete mouse notch), as part of the cross-platform wheel standardization project (#3533).
issues.issueTitle: Add wheel support to Tizen MAUI views with v120 normalization

issues.title: Maintainer-filed enhancement to add scroll wheel event support to SkiaSharp's Blazor WASM views (SKCanvasView and SKGLView) with values normalized to the v120 standard (120 = one discrete mouse wheel notch), as part of the cross-platform wheel standardization effort (#3533).
issues.issueTitle: Add wheel support to Blazor WASM views with v120 normalization

issues.title: Tracking issue to standardize SKTouchEventArgs.WheelDelta to the v120 convention (120 units = 1 mouse wheel notch) across all platforms; currently only Windows MAUI passes meaningful values while all other platforms hardcode 0 or lack wheel event handling entirely.
issues.issueTitle: Standardize WheelDelta to v120 convention across all platforms

issues.title: Reporter finds the closing </svg> tag missing when using SKSvgCanvas with SKManagedWStream, because managedStream.ToArray() is called before the SKCanvas is disposed — the SVG document is finalized (closing tag written) on canvas disposal, so reading the stream before disposal yields incomplete output.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKManagedWStream with SKSvgCanvas missing close SVG tag </svg>

issues.title: Native NuGet packages for Win32 increased from ~13 MB to ~75 MB and Linux from ~39 MB to ~54 MB in 3.119.2 due to native PDB files being included in packages after PR #3374 expanded the IsNativeAssetsProject symbol packaging to all platforms.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Sudden increase in disk usage in 3.119.2

issues.title: External-Dependency-Info.txt still lists libmicrohttpd (lines 1475-1988) even though PR #3463 removed the dependency from Skia's DEPS file; this stale entry is shipped as THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.txt in every NuGet package.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] libmicrohttpd is still listed in External-Dependency-Info.txt file

issues.title: Reporter claims images are not appearing on screen but provides no actual code, no error messages, no expected/actual behavior, and no screenshots — the bug template is essentially unfilled.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] My images are not appearing in the screen

issues.title: HarfBuzzSharp.Blob.FromStream uses a fixed block to pin a managed byte array, but the pointer escapes the fixed scope and is held by the native Blob, so the GC can relocate the array and cause a crash.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Blob FromStream is not GC safe

issues.title: MAUI app using SkiaSharp 3.119.1 crashes on certain Windows 11 systems with COMException 'Element not found' during WinRT activation of SkiaSharp.Views.WinUI.Native.PropertySetExtensions in the ANGLE/OpenGL rendering path (AngleSwapChainPanel → GlesContext.CreateSurface).
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Exception: SkiaSharp.Views.WinUI.Native.PropertySetExtensions

issues.title: SVG text elements lose their text content and x/y position attributes when multiple SKSvgCanvas instances are used in parallel via Task.Run on Windows; Linux is unaffected and the bug is a regression from SkiaSharp 2.88.9.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] text elements missing values when `SKSvgCanvas` is used in parallel

issues.title: DllNotFoundException for libSkiaSharp when running a Blazor WASM app upgraded from .NET 9 to .NET 10, affecting both SkiaSharp 3.116.1 and 3.119.2-preview.1. Duplicate of #3422 which describes the same .NET 10 Blazor WASM breakage.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] System.DllNotFoundException: libSkiaSharp

issues.title: SKXamlCanvas.Skia.cs throws NullReferenceException when the canvas resizes because CreateBitmap() calls FreeBitmap() twice, nullifying the bitmap that was just recreated between the two calls.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Resources are not freed correctly in Uno Platform's `SKXamlCanvas`

issues.title: Reporter describes a memory leak when drawing patterns in WPF on high-resolution monitors, specific to Nvidia Quadro GPUs. Disabling WPF hardware acceleration via RenderOptions.ProcessRenderMode = SoftwareOnly prevents the leak but is not acceptable for performance. Regression from 2.88.9 to 3.116.0.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG]  Memory Leak on Window with Nvidia GPU driver

issues.title: MAUI SKGLView on iOS fails with 'Failed to bind EAGLDrawable' and 'Failed to make complete framebuffer object' on .NET 10, resulting in a white canvas. The iOS SKGLViewHandler uses the deprecated OpenGL ES (GLKView/EAGLContext) backend, which appears increasingly broken on newer iOS SDKs shipped with .NET 10.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Failed to bind EAGLDrawable on .NET 10 in MAUI iOS

issues.title: Blazor WASM apps targeting .NET 10 fail at runtime with TypeInitializationException (SKImageInfo) or DllNotFoundException (libSkiaSharp) because SkiaSharp's pre-compiled emscripten static libraries (built for 3.1.56) may be incompatible with .NET 10's updated emscripten toolchain, and the wasm-tools workload or WasmBuildNative configuration may not be correctly set up.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Blazor WASM NET10 -

issues.title: Reporter requests 16 KB ELF page size alignment for libSkiaSharp.so to comply with Google Play's Android 16+ requirement. This was already fixed in PR #3096 (merged Dec 2024) which updated the Android NDK to r27c and added -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 linker flag, backported to v3.116.1 and v3.118.0-preview.2.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Android 16 KB page size support for libSkiaSharp.so

issues.title: SKDocument.CreateXps() renders <image> elements from SVG at approximately 30-40% of their correct size, while CreatePdf() renders the same SVG content correctly. All non-image SVG elements (text, barcodes, shapes) render correctly in both formats.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKDocument.CreateXps() incorrectly scales <image> elements from SVG, while CreatePdf() renders correctly

issues.title: DllNotFoundException for libSkiaSharp when deploying ASP.NET Core WebAPI to Azure Container Apps via .NET Aspire, despite referencing SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Linux.NoDependencies. The error indicates libfontconfig.so.1 is missing, which means the fontconfig-dependent binary is being loaded instead of the NoDependencies variant.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Unable to load on Azure Container app with Aspire

issues.title: SKCanvasView in Blazor WASM does not fill 100% height of its parent container because the canvas element's intrinsic size (set by the JS interop for the drawing buffer) interferes with CSS percentage-based height in flexbox layouts.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKCanvasView in Blazor WASM not using 100% height

issues.title: SKCanvasView in Blazor throws unhandled TypeError during Dispose() when SizeWatcherInterop.Stop() calls ResizeObserver.unobserve() with an undefined element reference, caused by the DOM element being removed before the component is disposed.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Unhandled exception in Dispose() when show/hide multiple SKCanvasView in Blazor

issues.title: SKCanvasView in Blazor WASM shows severe performance degradation (120fps to sub-20fps) when drawing a scaled SKImage, because the raster backend performs CPU-based image scaling in WASM; SKGLView handles it fine via GPU hardware acceleration.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Blazor - SKImage rendering tanks performance when scaling image in SKCanvasView

issues.title: Reporter encounters compiler errors (CS0117, CS1501) when upgrading from SkiaSharp 2.88.9 to 3.x because SKMatrix.MakeTranslation, MakeScale, MakeRotation, MakeIdentity, and static PostConcat were renamed/replaced with Create* instance methods in the 3.0 breaking changes.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKMatrix Operations work well in SkiaSharp 2.88.9 not work in  3.119.0

issues.title: Reporter's Blazor web app throws 'native libSkiaSharp library version incompatible' exception on Linux Azure App Service due to DevExpress.Drawing.Skia pulling a different version of SkiaSharp native assets than the explicitly referenced SkiaSharp 3.119.0, and the NativeAssets.Linux.NoDependencies package being referenced in a library project instead of the application project.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Web app throws native libSkiaSharp library version exception in hosted environment

issues.title: Blazor WASM app running in IDE debug mode shows 'No canvas element was provided' console error due to stale cached static assets; clearing browser and project caches resolves the issue, but is impractical for server deployments with many users.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Blazor Wasm [DebugMode]: No canvas element was provided

issues.title: NullReferenceException in SKManagedWStreamWriteProxyImplementation when an exception thrown during SKSvgCanvas drawing is caught externally, leaving the canvas and managed stream undisposed so the native finalizer later invokes the write callback on a GC'd object.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Blazor null exception at SkiaSharp.DelegateProxies.SKManagedWStreamWriteProxyImplementation

issues.title: DllNotFoundException for libSkiaSharp in Blazor WASM because the reporter uses SkiaSharp directly in a class library without referencing SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.WebAssembly or SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor in the WASM app project. WASM requires static linking via NativeFileReference, which only activates when the NativeAssets.WebAssembly package is present.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Blazor Wasm : The type initializer for 'SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo' threw an exception

issues.title: Blazor views (SKCanvasView and SKGLView) construct HTML element IDs using the internal Blazor convention '_bl_' + ElementReference.Id, which is documented as not safe for user code, risking breakage if Blazor changes this internal convention.
issues.issueTitle: Blazor views use the Blazor element ID `_bl_#` which may not be safe

issues.title: DllNotFoundException for libSkiaSharp when using SkiaSharp in a WASI Wasm console app (wasi-wasm RID) because the NativeAssets.WebAssembly MSBuild targets only activate for Blazor and Uno Platform WASM apps, not WASI.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] DllNotFoundException when trying to invoke Skia in a Wasi Wasm Console app

issues.title: Blazor WASM app using SkiaSharp 2.88.3 with .NET 8 and InteractiveWebAssembly render mode works in Visual Studio debugger but crashes with MONO AOT runtime error (aot-runtime-wasm.c:150) when deployed to Azure App Service, because the 2.88.x WASM static libraries lack proper emscripten version mapping for .NET 8.
issues.issueTitle: Skia Blazor Runs in debugger but not when deployed

issues.title: TypeInitializationException with inner DllNotFoundException for libSkiaSharp when using SkiaSharp 2.88.3 in a Blazor WebAssembly app on Windows, with a recent report of the same error on SkiaSharp 3.119.0 with .NET 8.
issues.issueTitle: The type initializer for 'SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo' threw an exception

issues.title: DllNotFoundException for libSkiaSharp on Linux (Docker/Alpine/Azure) due to missing native dependencies (fontconfig), incorrect NativeAssets package selection, or GLIBC version incompatibility. Multiple root causes reported across 43 comments spanning 2 years; the GLIBC issue is confirmed fixed in 3.119.0-preview.1.2.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKiaSharp on linux can't find liblibSkiaSharp.so

issues.title: Repeated Surface.Snapshot() calls in OnPaintSurface on a large Blazor WASM canvas (8000x2000) without disposing previous SKImage instances exhausts WASM heap memory after ~34 iterations, crashing in SkData::MakeWithCopy during pixel allocation.
issues.issueTitle: Exception when doing snapshot in OnPaintSurface

issues.title: TypeInitializationException for SKData when deploying a .NET 6 server-side app to Docker on GCP — caused by missing or conflicting SkiaSharp NativeAssets.Linux packages in the container, not a code bug.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG]  The type initializer for 'SkiaSharp.SKData' threw an exception (even after applying the solution of issue #2124).

issues.title: SKBitmap.Decode and SKCodec.Create return null for a specific JPEG image that is valid and renders correctly in other viewers. Tested on SkiaSharp 2.80.4 and 2.88.3 on both Linux and Windows.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKBitmap.Decode always returns null for a specific image

issues.title: DllNotFoundException for libSkiaSharp when deploying Blazor WebAssembly (.NET 7.0) app to Azure App Service via GitHub Actions. Works with .NET 6.0 but not .NET 7.0. SkiaSharp 2.88.3 predates .NET 7 WASM support which was added in later 2.88.x releases.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SkiaSharp not working when deploy Blazor client side application (.NET 7.0) to Azure App Service (Windows) using GitHub Actions (CI/CD Pipeline)

issues.title: Request to make SKGLView.Dispose() virtual in the Blazor implementation so that subclasses can properly override disposal behavior.
issues.issueTitle: [FEATURE] Make Dispose a virtual method in SKGLView for blazor

issues.title: SKFontManager.MatchTypeface returns null for custom fonts loaded via SKTypeface.FromStream() in Blazor WASM because custom-loaded fonts are not registered with the system font manager, and the method was deprecated for not working on all platforms.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKFontManager.MatchTypeface return null for custom font in Blazor

issues.title: Colors render incorrectly with alpha/transparency in Blazor WASM because SKCanvasView creates the raster surface with SKAlphaType.Opaque instead of SKAlphaType.Premul, making it the only platform view with this alpha type; HTML Canvas putImageData interprets the undefined alpha bytes, causing color distortion.
issues.issueTitle: Colors are not correct with alpha in WASM

issues.title: Feature request to expose the private GRContext field as a public property on the Blazor SKGLView component, matching the pattern used by MAUI and macOS SKGLView implementations.
issues.issueTitle: [FEATURE] [Blazor] Expose GRContext in SKGLView.razor.cs

issues.title: Reporter gets SRI integrity hash mismatch error for SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor.dll when publishing a Blazor WASM app on Windows 10 with SkiaSharp 2.88.1 and VS 2022 Preview 17.4.0 Preview 1.0; works fine in debug mode.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] I get Failed to find a valid digest in the 'integrity' attribute when publish wasm on windows 10

issues.title: EntryPointNotFoundException for sk_paint_set_stroke_width in Blazor WASM when deployed to Azure App Service with SkiaSharp 2.88.1 on .NET 6.0, caused by the IL trimmer stripping P/Invoke methods during publish.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Blazor WASM EntryPointNotFoundException

issues.title: Tracking issue to enable nullable reference types in SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor — already completed in PR #2505 (SkiaSharp 3.0 modernization) which added <Nullable>enable</Nullable> and restructured the project with full nullable annotations.
issues.issueTitle: Enable Nullable Reference Types (SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor)

issues.title: SKGLView in Blazor WASM fails to render some elements on iOS Safari while SKCanvasView renders correctly; likely a WebGL compatibility issue on mobile Safari.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKGLView doesn't work correctly on Blazor running on iOS

issues.title: Feature request to expose the private canvasSize field as a public CanvasSize property on SKCanvasView and SKGLView in SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor, matching the pattern already used by WPF, WinUI, and Uno platform views.
issues.issueTitle: [FEATURE] [WASM] Expose canvasSize in SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor

issues.title: SKTypeface.FromFamilyName returns default font (Noto Mono) instead of requested font family in Blazor WASM because the WASM sandbox has no access to system fonts.
issues.issueTitle: SKTypeface.FromFamilyName does not change the font or text style in SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor

issues.title: SKBitmap.Decode and SKCodec.Create appear to hang indefinitely when decoding a PNG containing a ~100MB Exif metadata chunk, because Skia's PNG codec reads all pre-IDAT chunks in 4KB increments with no size limit or cancellation mechanism.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Cannot decode picture with large Exif values

issues.title: The net462 NuGet build targets file uses Content items with Link metadata for native library files, which causes the ASP.NET publish pipeline to copy native binaries to both the root and bin directories of published web apps.
issues.issueTitle: Use of Content.Link tags in targets file for nuget generates unnecessary copies during publish of webapp

issues.title: Feature request to improve SKVertices API by exposing SkVertices::Builder, adding vertex/index count parameters, and adding ReadOnlySpan<T> overloads to CreateCopy for efficient vertex buffer construction without forced array allocations.
issues.issueTitle: [FEATURE] Improve SKVertices API

issues.title: Reporter asks how to read 24-bit RGB Netpbm (PPM/PGM) images with SkiaSharp, since the format has no alpha channel and cannot be loaded directly as 32-bit ARGB/BGRA.
issues.issueTitle: [QUESTION] Reading 24-bit Netpbm (PPM, PGM) Image With SkiaSharp

issues.title: Reporter gets CS0809 'Obsolete member overrides non-obsolete member' warning for OnSizeChanged in their custom CircularGauge class inheriting from SKCanvasView on Android after upgrading Xamarin.AndroidX packages, but SkiaSharp has never marked OnSizeChanged as [Obsolete].
issues.issueTitle: [BUG]Obsolete member overrides non-obsolete member

issues.title: SKGLView on iOS leaks IOGPUResource objects during continuous rendering via CADisplayLink, causing app freeze at 60,000 GPU resources. SKCanvasView does not exhibit this leak. Last commenter reported inability to reproduce on SkiaSharp 2.88.6, suggesting possible improvement in later versions.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] [iOS] SKGLView Memory Leak compared to SKCanvasView

issues.title: Reporter describes memory leak when repeatedly drawing SKPath on SKCanvas during rapid window resizing on UWP with SkiaSharp 2.80.2. Memory approximately doubles and is not reclaimed by GC. Related issue #2368 confirmed this was fixed in SkiaSharp 3.116.1.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] Suspect memory leak with SKPath on SKCanvas

issues.title: SKGLSurfaceView freezes the Android app when returning from background because SKGLSurfaceViewRenderer.OnSurfaceCreated is empty and does not reset the stale GRContext after the EGL context is destroyed and recreated.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] SKGLSurfaceView freezes page when returning from the background.

issues.title: Crash in HandleDictionary.RegisterHandle (exception code 0x80000004) when creating SKFont or accessing SKSurface.Canvas on Windows 10 with SkiaSharp 2.80.2, affecting multiple users of an OpenGL-based game using RichTextKit for text rendering.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] [2.80.2] Crash in HandleDictionary.RegisterHandle

issues.title: Reporter believes SKMatrix.CreateRotationDegrees gives wrong results, but the behavior is correct by-design: rotation without a pivot rotates around origin (0,0), so a pre-translated path appears to swing around the origin instead of rotating in place.
issues.issueTitle: [BUG] CreateRotation Gives the Wrong Answer

issues.title: Feature request to support SkiaSharp as a Blazor Extension enabling use on both client-side (WASM) and server-side Blazor deployment models. Client-side WASM support was delivered via PR #1811 and the SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor package; server-side Blazor rendering remains unimplemented.
issues.issueTitle: [FEATURE] Support SkiaSharp as a Blazor Extension
